---
title: Active Voice
description: Guidelines for using active voice in technical writing
---

## Why active voice matters

Active voice makes your writing clearer and more direct. It tells readers who does what.

### Use active voice

| Instead of | Use |
|---|---|
| The file was deleted by the user. | The user deleted the file. |
| The settings are configured by the admin. | The admin configures the settings. |
| Errors were reported by the system. | The system reported errors. |

### When passive voice is acceptable

Passive voice is acceptable when:

- The actor is unknown or unimportant
- You want to emphasize the action over the actor
- The subject is the focus of the sentence
